title: Steel Ball
body:
# Steel Ball and Spin

### A small Steel Ball Run inspired resource pack that replaces the Trident with a Steel Ball.
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f53304b608839e897a71cf57db54852c8aa7756.png)

## Features

* Replaced the Trident with a custom Steel Ball model
* Added custom Steel Ball textures
* The Trident is now renamed to:

  * **Steel Ball**
* 
* The Loyalty enchantment is renamed to:

  * **Spin**
* 
* Custom in-hand and thrown Steel Ball model
* Custom GUI model and scaling
* The Steel Ball can also appear when using a Trident in the head slot
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/813b9cfc1dfbda4794c649a5c87e49ed4830742d.png)

## Future Updates

No future updates are planned for this pack.

However, if you have suggestions or ideas, feel free to message me on Discord:
**@gamerdavaa**
![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/442a77d6ca4f4a41f3f82b9e6391e94b1e2deebc.png)

## Credits

Inspired by Steel Ball Run from JoJo’s Bizarre Adventure.
